# I Care Air Care

> I Care Air Care is a Wesley Chapel, Florida HVAC contractor (one company, founded 2010 by Tim Hawk). Family-run, Florida licensed CAC1816515, EPA 608 Universal certified, 4.9★ with 600+ Google reviews. Same-day AC repair, 21-point maintenance, full system installation, air duct cleaning, heating, refrigeration, and smart thermostat installation across Pasco, Hillsborough, and Polk counties — including Wesley Chapel, Tampa, New Tampa, Land O' Lakes, Lutz, Odessa, and Zephyrhills.

- **Phone**: (813) 395-2324
- **Email**: tim@icareaircare.com
- **Address**: 27022 Foamflower Blvd, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544
- **License**: Florida CAC1816515
- **Owner**: Tim Hawk (Master HVAC technician, 30+ years in the trade, EPA 608 Universal)
- **Founded**: 2010
- **Book online**: https://www.icareaircare.com/book/

## Core service pages

- [AC Repair in Wesley Chapel & Tampa](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/ac-repair-tampa/): Same-day diagnosis and flat-rate repair. Most repairs $150–$600. Capacitor $180–$260, contactor $180–$300, fan motor $400–$650, refrigerant recharge $350–$750, compressor $1,800–$3,200.
- [Urgent / Emergency AC Repair](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/emergency-ac-repair-tampa/): Priority dispatch for no-cool homes during heat waves. Same-day windows when route allows.
- [AC Maintenance & Tune-Ups](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/ac-maintenance-tampa/): 21-point seasonal tune-up. Annual plans include two visits, priority dispatch, 15% repair discount.
- [HVAC Installation](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/hvac-installation-tampa/): Manual-J sized replacements. Most 2–4 ton residential replacements run $6,500–$13,500. Synchrony financing available.
- [Air Duct Cleaning](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/air-duct-cleaning-tampa/): 7-step HEPA + antimicrobial process for Tampa Bay homes.
- [Heating Services](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/heating-services-tampa/): Heat pumps, auxiliary heat strips, occasional gas furnaces.
- [Refrigeration Repair](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/refrigeration-repair-tampa/): Walk-ins, reach-ins, ice machines, light commercial.
- [Thermostat Installation](https://www.icareaircare.com/services/thermostat-installation-tampa/): Ecobee, Nest, Honeywell with Florida heat-pump configuration.

## Service areas

- [Wesley Chapel](https://www.icareaircare.com/service-areas/wesley-chapel-ac-repair/) (HQ — Foamflower Blvd, ZIPs 33543/33544/33545; neighborhoods include Seven Oaks, Meadow Pointe, Wiregrass Ranch, Epperson Ranch, Mirada, Watergrass, Persimmon Park, Saddlebrook, Lexington Oaks)
